raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un weena Balſs notiſke
no angſchenes ta Iſplattijuma/
kas wirs winnu Galwahn bija/
kad tee ſtahweja un ſawus
Spahrnuß bij nolaideutihi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wirs ta Iſplattiju.
ma/ kas wirs winnu Galwahn
bija/ bija tas redſams ka weens
Sawira Akmis/ ka weens
Gohdibas Krehsſis / un us to
Gohdibas Krehſlu bija weens
Gihmis/ ka kahda Zilweka/ kas
us to fehdeja.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un es redſeju itt ka deg-
goschu Spohſchunu / tapatt
weenu Ugguns Gihmi apkahrt
eekſch ta/ no winna Gurneem
us augſchn/un no winna Gur-
neem leija redſeju es weenn Ug-
guns Gihmi/ un weenu Spoh-
schunu pee ta apkahrt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Itt ka tas Gihmis wee-
nas Warra-Wihſnes irr / kas
Badebbeti ſtahw Leetus Laika/
tapatt bija tas Spohſchums ap-
kahrt. Schis bija tas Gihmis
tahs Lihsſibas taKUNGA Goh-
dibas. Un kad es to redſeju/ krit-
tu es us fawu Waigu/ un dſir-
deju Balſi weena kas runnaja.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Wiꞥſch tazzija
iman : Tu Zilwe-
Behrns/ ſtahw us
wahn Kahjahm / tad es ar
win runnaschu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un kad wiꞥſch us m
runnaja / tad nahze tas Go
eekſch mannim/kas mann usze
le us mannahm Kahjahm/ un
dſirdeju to/ kas us man runna
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch tazzija usma
Tu Zilweka Behrns/ Es fuh
teiw pee teem Iſraeka Behrneei
pee teem pahrgalwigeein La
din / kas man irr prettiturr
ſchees/ winni/ un winnu Teh
irr prett man pahckahpuſch
lihdsſchai paſchai Deenai.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet teem Behrneem
beſklauntgi Waigi un zeet
Sirdeis/ es fuhtu tewi pee wi
neem/ un tew buhgus teem ta
zibt : Ta fakka tas Kung
KUNGS.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un jepſchu tee klaufa jeb
klansa/ jo tee irr weens pahrgo
wigs Nams/ tatschu teem but
ſinaht / ka weens Prawee
winno Widdu irr bijis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tu Zilweka Behrns/
bihſtees preekſch winneem/ un
baiſlojees preekſch winnu Wah-
deem/ jepſchu Pahrgalwigee u
Ehrkſchki pee tewim irr/ un
dſihwo pee Skarpijeem/ tome
ne bihſtees preekſch winnu Wah-
deem / un ne baiſlojees preekſ
wi
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
